opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Viking Plumbing is phone-only with no booking tool detected on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing emergencies go to competitors who offer instant online booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing emergency and scheduled jobs 24/7 without calls.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; all contact is phone-only at (208) 369-9933.
opportunities.observation: Every unanswered or unbooked call from 35 years of Boise customers is lost forever.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to record, transcribe, and follow up every inquiry.

opportunities.label: Dormant Customer Reactivation
opportunities.signal: 35-year-old business with only 189 reviews signals a large dormant customer base.
opportunities.observation: Thousands of past Boise customers receive zero outreach, leaving recurring revenue uncaptured.
opportunities.fix: Run AI-driven reactivation campaigns targeting past customers with seasonal plumbing service offers.
